/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/entities/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/entities/Platform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/entities/Buff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/entities/DoublePointBuff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/entities/RocketBuff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/entities/ShieldBuff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/entities/Portal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/state/MenuState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/state/GameState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/doodlejump.dir/src/state/GuideState.cpp.o -o doodlejump  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-audio.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
